steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice D is correct. The value of $g(0)$ is found by substituting 0 for x in the function g. This yields $g(0) = -0 + 8 = 8$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from misinterpreting the equation as $g(x) = x + (-8)$ instead of $g(x) = -x + (-8)$. Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of x, not $g(x)$. Choice C is incorrect and may result from calculation errors.
